appName.description: Extension name shown in toolbar and CWS

appDescription.message: Right-click images to save as PNG, JPG, or WebP, remove white/checker backgrounds, or add white/black fills locally.
appDescription.description: Extension description shown in CWS (max 132 chars)

menuSaveAsDefault.description: Context menu item label for the default format

menuRemoveWhiteBackground.description: Context menu item label for removing a white or checkerboard preview background

menuAddWhiteBackground.description: Context menu item label for flattening transparency onto white

menuAddBlackBackground.description: Context menu item label for flattening transparency onto black

whatsNewKicker.description: Kicker above the popup update notice

whatsNewTitle.description: Title for the popup update notice

whatsNewBody.message: Downloads now use better names from the image, page, and source URL when available.
whatsNewBody.description: Body text for the popup update notice

whatsNewDismiss.description: Aria label for dismissing the popup update notice

oneImageConverted.description: Conversion counter text for exactly 1 image

trustMessage.message: Your images never leave your browser

ratePrompt.message: Enjoying this? Rate it on the Chrome Web Store

errorMessage.message: Could not convert this image. The source may be restricted.
